features: ✍️Wooden Magnetic Color Matching Puzzle: Montessori wooden toys for 3+ year old. The color matching puzzle comes with 20 double-sided cards, 1 magnetic pen and 16 round wooden pieces. Randomly select a card, and use the pen to move the pieces, through thinking to make the puzzle match the pattern on the card, which is very suitable for kids brain teaser game to keep them engaged for hours. Good for kids logical thinking and problem solving. It also allows kids to practice holding a pen!

🧩Montessori Educational Toys for Kids Age 3+: The puzzle busy board is a great educational toy specially designed for kids age 4 5 6 7 year old boys girls. The pieces of this puzzle are designed with 4 colors, which helps to train your child develop color recognition, hand-eye coordination, fine motor skills, and critical thinking skills. Great toys for autistic children which likes arranging things and repetition activities. That is great and no pieces to pick up after.

🎉Essential Activity for Home/Travel/Classroom: Great thinking activity for kids and even adults. This 5.7 inch x 8.26 inch wooden maze puzzle toy is suitable for toddler age 3-5 year old. The montessori wooden toy is lightweight and portable, which is easy for children to carry in their backpacks and take it to anywhere, such as restaurants, cars, airplanes and so on. Great for extended car rides, perfect travel toys for 4 5 6 7 8 year old kids boys play on plane.

💎High Quality and Sturdy Construction: Made of natural wood material, with smooth edges, compact and lightweight. All wooden blocks are securely sealed under a transparent acrylic board to prevent them from falling, and the magnetic pen is secured to the magnetic activity board with a rope to prevent loss. Easy for you to store, and you could take it outside conveniently. Kids friendly toys are more suitable as gifts for your 4-8 year old kids, grandson, nieces and nephews.

🎁Ideal Gifts for 4 5 6 Year Old Boys Girls: Are you struggling with choosing a gift for your child? BUY IT NOW and let kids enjoy the classic game! Unique gifts for 3-4-5-6 year old boys girls and toddlers, classic puzzle toy is loved by people of all ages, a best gift choice for birthday, Christmas, Children's Day, New Year and Classroom activities. It helps kids stay away from electronics, suitable for playing at home, preschool, kindergarten or outdoor.
